hooks.command: input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo $input | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo $file_path | grep -q '.swift$'; then /Users/m4pro_sv/bin/swift-format format --in-place $file_path 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); fp=$(echo $input | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$fp" ] && echo $fp | grep -qE '[.](swift|pbxproj|plist|xcassets|entitlements)'; then touch /Users/m4pro_sv/Desktop/EnviousWispr/.needs-uat; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); fp=$(echo $input | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$fp" ] && echo $fp | grep -qE '(Package[.]resolved|[.]env|sparkle_eddsa|SPARKLE.*PRIVATE|[.]needs-uat)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Protected file: edits to lock files, secret files, and UAT markers are blocked by hook"}}'; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'tccutil reset' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'com\.enviouswispr'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Blanket tccutil reset without bundle ID. Use: tccutil reset <category> com.enviouswispr.app"}}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm|unlink|mv).*[.]needs-uat'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Do not manually delete .needs-uat. It must be cleared by a passing UAT run."}}'; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); if [ -f /Users/m4pro_sv/Desktop/EnviousWispr/.needs-uat ] && echo "$input" | jq -e '[.tool_input.todos[] | select(.status == "completed")] | length > 0' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Cannot mark tasks complete — project files modified since last passing UAT run. Run wispr-rebuild-and-relaunch first. Do NOT manually delete .needs-uat."}}'; fi; exit 0
